description_for_human: 智能API接口服务平台，一个Key调用多个主流大模型，¥298/年包年不限量。
description_for_model: Shanhai Intelligence API Service - A unified API gateway that provides access to multiple mainstream large language models through a single API key. Pricing: 298 CNY/year with no usage limits. Compatible with OpenAI API protocol. Features intelligent routing across multiple model channels for optimal performance.
